name: Beer Garden
description: Open-air drinking with long dwell times and a crowd in a relaxed, spending mood.

name: Brewery & Taproom
description: Taprooms full of regulars with time on their hands and a little money to spend.

name: Barcade
description: Arcade bars where adults linger between games — prime dwell time for an impulse pull.

name: Bar & Pub
description: Neighborhood spots where a card machine becomes a conversation piece and a draw.

name: Pool Hall
description: Long sessions, repeat visits, and a crowd that loves a little side action.

name: Game & Hobby Shop
description: Collectors already in the building — sealed packs by the register sell themselves.

name: Shopping Mall
description: Constant foot traffic and families browsing with time to kill — a natural impulse buy on the concourse.

name: Convenience Store
description: Quick, repeat visits all day long — a sealed-pack machine earns its corner by the counter.

name: Comic Book Shop
description: Collectors are already in the door — adding sealed packs is the easiest upsell in the store.

name: Toy & Hobby Store
description: Families already shopping for exactly this — a pack machine fits the shelf and the moment.

name: Card & Collectibles Shop
description: A dedicated collector crowd — a 24/7 sealed-pack machine extends your counter and your hours.

name: Barbershop & Salon
description: Built-in wait times and a captive chair — the classic spot for an impulse machine.

name: Laundromat
description: Thirty idle minutes per visit and an outlet to spare — laundromats and vending go way back.

name: Car Wash
description: Drivers waiting on the wash with nothing to do — a lobby machine turns dead time into sales.

name: Coffee Shop & Café
description: Regulars who linger over a drink — a tucked-in card machine becomes a small daily ritual.

name: Pizzeria
description: Families waiting on a pie — a sealed-pack machine by the counter is an easy add to the order.

name: Ice Cream & Dessert Shop
description: A treat-mode crowd of families out together — the perfect frame of mind for an impulse pull.

name: Food Hall
description: Groups lingering over food and drink in shared space — high traffic, long dwell, easy placement.

name: Movie Theater
description: Lobbies full of people early for showtimes — a card machine catches them with cash to spend.

name: Bowling Alley
description: Long sessions, families and leagues, and a crowd already primed for a little side fun.

name: Family Entertainment Center
description: Built for family impulse spending — a pack machine fits right alongside the games.

name: Trampoline Park
description: Families in for the afternoon with downtime on the benches — prime territory for an impulse pull.

name: Family Arcade
description: A token-and-prize crowd that already loves the pull — sealed packs slot right into the floor.

name: Skating Rink
description: Roller and ice rinks pack in families for hours — long dwell, built-in breaks, easy placement.

name: Climbing Gym
description: A young, social crowd resting between climbs — high dwell and a lobby that suits a machine.

name: Hotel & Lodge
description: Guests and families with downtime in the lobby — a sealed-pack machine adds a little delight.

name: Farmers Market
description: Seasonal crowds strolling with cash in hand — a stall-side machine rides the weekend rush.

description: Dense, browsing crowds in a spending mood — peak impulse territory when the market is on.

name: Pop-Up Market & Shop
description: Short runs and dense, cash-in-hand browsing crowds — drop a machine in for the pop-up and pull it after.

name: Holiday Market

name: Fair & Festival

name: Ski Resort & Lodge
description: Day-lodge crowds waiting out the cold with time and money — strong seasonal dwell.

name: Convention & Expo
